_comment: The settings.json exactly as Claude first writes it in Step 3 — BEFORE the 'When the leash chafes' tightening. Note the allow list has no Edit/Write entries yet, so every CLAUDE.md edit prompts for approval. The main work/.claude/settings.json in this repo is the AFTER state (Edit/Write inside ~/work/ auto-approve). Shown here so you can see what changed and why.
